description.value: > Souls Associated Domain: Repose. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the gentle rest power of the Repose domain. Touch the Spirit World (Su): With a touch, you can empower a weapon to affect incorporeal creatures. The weapon touched deals half damage to incorporeal creatures, or full damage if it is a magic weapon. This benefit lasts for a number of rounds equal to your cleric level. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier. Replacement Domain Spells: 3rd— animate dead, 6th— antilife shell, 9th— trap the soul.
